title: Pleroma radula

It is part of the genus Pleroma, which contains about 15 species of flowering plants. The Ericaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Pleroma radula belonging to the subfamily Epacridoideae. This subfamily is native to the southern hemisphere, particularly in Australia and New Zealand. Pleroma radula is a relatively rare and endemic species.
